name: Savoy Cabbage and Corn Chowder
recipeIngredient: 2 1/2 cups New potatoes, cut into 1/2-inch cubes
1/2 cup Fat-free chicken broth, low salt
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a flat-bottom wok or large, deep sauté pan. Sauté cabbage until sweetened, about 4 minutes.
2. Add onion and sauté for 1-2 minutes.
3. Add carrot, potatoes, cilantro, and canned chili peppers. Combine pinches of dried herbs and seeds with a smaller pinch of fresh rosemary leaves.
4. Grind (or crush) the seasonings, then add to the soup. Season with pepper and salt and stir well.
5. Pour in the milk. Add chicken broth to cover the potatoes; add 1/4 cup more if needed to raise the liquid level.
6. Bring to a boil. Cover and reduce heat to simmer; cook the potatoes for 20 minutes, stirring occasionally.
7. Puree half of the soup. Add 5-6 ounces of fresh or thawed corn kernels.
8. Top with snipped thyme. Cover and simmer another 10-12 minutes.
9. Serve in chowder bowls with sauces like Maggi or Tabasco sauce.
